title: anthoxanthum juncifolium
intro: Anthoxanthum juncifolium, also known as sweet grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family that is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The health benefits of sweet grass include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a sense of calm. Sweet grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
